snippet.title: Sira E Hou (Official Video) | Amrit Maan | Nimrat Khaira | Desi Crew | Latest Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
'Sira E Hou' is a Punjabi track sung by Amrit Maan and Nimrat Khaira. Amrit Maan, himself has penned the lyrics with the music by Desi Crew. The Music Video is beautifully directed by directors Harry Singh and Preet Singh. It's a groovy track and will surely make you tap your feet. 

Stream / Download from
Gaana :http://bit.ly/37snJ5k
iTunes :http://apple.co/37t8BF4
Apple Music :http://apple.co/37nN0hh
JioSaavn :http://bit.ly/3k2Ep8I
Spotify :http://spoti.fi/3qz1Nx9
Hungama :http://bit.ly/3dBwkH7
Wynk :http://bit.ly/3qLOLfC
Amazon Music :https://amzn.to/2NkymjZ
Youtube Music :http://bit.ly/37rwVHn

Songo Lyrics
Sira e hou
Sira e hou
Sira e hou

Desi Crew… Desi Crew… Desi Crew… Desi Crew…

Mukhde to pauga bhlekha chann da
Jani khani utte nahio dil mannda
Mukhde to pauga bhlekha chann da
Jani khani utte nahio dil mannda

Ho paugi kahrood jo
Jatti ni barood jo
Nira e hou nira e hou

Ho turru jehdi taur ni
Patt dungi shor ni
Chhada ju 12 bor ni
Ho sira e hou sira e hou
Jatti sira e hou

Ho paune 6 k foot jatta meri height ve
Methon puchhan saheliyan jo lawaan diet ve
Main vi bahuteyan friend’a ch believe naa karan
Mere pichhe chobbran ch hundi fight ve

Jo khadu mere pakh ch
Garoor jihdi akh ch
Nira e hou nira e hou

Main vekhun mud mud ke
Rahun naal jud ke
Te paaun chitte kurte
Sira e hou sira e hou
Jatt sira e hou

Ho maahdi moti gall nahio jaan vaardi
Ho gaya main talli phadu chabi car di
Limit ni kardi cross kade oh
Family joint hou meri naar di

Ho kahi ni main mod’da
Dil ni main tod’da
Pikka lai doon Ford da
Sira e hou sira e hou

Ho goneaane aaugi
Vekhi kivein chhaugi
Suit jadon paaugi
Sira e hou ohdon sira e hou

Suit karaan order maim online ve
Akh nakk lakk mere tinne fine ve
Surajan naan mera kithe aa mukabala
Mukh mera eddan karda ae shine ve

Ho paina jadon hass main
10 bata 10 main
Sira e hou sira e hou

Maana tere naal ve
Zindagi kamaal ve
Ghair dena thaal ve
Sira e hou sira e hou
Utton sira e hou

Ho poora maan taan oh deyun Maan nu
Khad ke Bhatinda dekhuga rakaan nu
Jehde mere yaar mainu rehn chhed’de
Den’ge wadhaiyan gabbru jawan nu

Hmm dohein same same ji
Jatti naale mem ji
Pau jehdi game ji
Sira e hou sira he hou

Ho pakki laa doon mohar jo
Sulfe di lor jo
Gussa deyu thor jo
Sira e hou sira e hou
Jatti sira e hou

Mere naal khad ke
Zindagi se varke
Naal naal padh ke
Sira e hou jatta sira e hou

Sira e hou sira e hou
Sira e hou

snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj |  Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ‘4 Idiots’ group
Thiruvannamalai Parai Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
‘Geoshred’ Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ‘Pei’ Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G – S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam – R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed – Diamond Babu

Lyric Video Edited by - Madhivanan VS
Lyric video by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

snippet.title: Soorarai Pottru - Deleted Scene 01 - Maara All Lost | Sudha Kongara | Suriya | 2D Entertainment
snippet.description:
Get a glimpse of Surya’s  “Soorarai Pottru” deleted scene 01. Amazon’s original movie Surya’s “Soorarai Pottru” is about Maara (Surya), a boy from a remote village dreaming of having his airline service.

Find out the challenges he has to face in this journey to see his dream come true. 2D Entertainment presents a deleted scene as a part of a 100th-day promotion that you shouldn’t miss.

Watch the full movie now. Also, to watch more deleted scenes from the action-drama, subscribe to 2D Entertainment.

snippet.title: Hidden Detailing of Drishyam 2 | Unnoticed Things | Duo media
snippet.description:
Hidden Detailing Of Drishyam 2 | Unnoticed Things | Duo media

we are presenting Drishyam 2 Movie Hidden Detailing.
In this video we talking about the drishyam 2 Unnoticed Things In common eye.


Drishyam 2: The Resumption, or simply Drishyam 2, is a 2021 Indian Malayalam-language drama thriller film written and directed by Jeethu Joseph and produced by Antony Perumbavoor through the company Aashirvad Cinemas. It is a sequel to their 2013 film Drishyam.

Release date: 19 February 2021 (India)

Director: Jeethu Joseph

Producer: Antony Perumbavoor

Cinematography: Satheesh Kurup

Production company: Aashirvad Cinemas


Six years after the events of the Varun missing case, Georgekutty and his family now live an upgraded lifestyle. Georgekutty is much more wealthier than earlier, as he runs a movie theatre in his township and is also planning to produce a film. Their younger daughter Anu has turned 18 and in the final year of schooling in a residential school. His elder daughter Anju is planning for higher studies, while her mother Rani is desperately trying to arrange her marriage. Anju now suffers from occasional epileptic fits, triggered by extreme stress and Rani still lives in worry. While Georgekutty and Anu have moved on, he has also forbidden any discussion about the incident under his roof. The present wealthy status of the family has made the neighbourhood jealous of them, and the townspeople who once sympathised with Georgekutty are now gossiping and propagating fabricated stories destroying the goodwill of the family.

snippet.title: Kaka | Dhund Di Khushboo  ▶ਧੁੰਦ ਦੀ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ | Adaab Kharoud | Official Video | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
They say, “Love is in the air”... It’s time to experience the notion with “Dhund Di Khushboo”❤️
Bringing to you one more melody by your favorite Kaka Ji🎶. 

Song Credits: 
Song: Dhund Di Khushboo
Artist: Kaka, Adaab kharoud
Music Composer and Lyricist: Kaka 
Music Director: Gavin Beats
Video Director: Sukh D
Project conceived and managed by - scope entertainment (https://instagram.com/scope.entertainment?igshid=1l8hzgstsktao)
Casting agency: Medazenith Makers
Photography: Farmer sons
Directed by: Sukh D(instagram.com/iamsukhd)
Special Thanks:  Kimberly The boarding school
Official Radio Partner - 94.3 (MY FM)


#SaregamaMusic​
#Kaka​
#DhundDiKhushboo

Lyrics: 
Dhundh di khushboo adiye ni , 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa,
Palkaan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
Ohh sadak tere pind wali ni, 
dovan da raah padayian da,
Tera hasna nai bhul skda me , 
dil kad lenda c rahiyan da
Tu pedal hi hundi c ,
me cycle te aunda c ,
Science lab vich beh k ni tenu vekh k gaane gaunda c ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
jad sardi kehar kmaundi aa,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa,,
ik latt tere mathe nu chum k , 
thodi nu c touch krdi
kahanian varge khaab mere ,
muskaan teri c sach krdi
menu eh mehsoos hunda ,
eh dhundh nahi eh tu hi aa, 
ta hi mere rom rom nu es traah galh laundi aa ,
dhund di khushboo adiye ni, 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa ,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
ik nazar pehla hi zaalam c ,
kuj surme sun hathyaar tere ,
mere wang hi marde c tere te 2,3 yaar mere ,,
ik nu tu naah kr gayi c ,
kaiyan di himaat mar gyi c jdo menu vekh k ,
has pendi sab kehnde c tenu chaundi aa,,,

snippet.title: Soorarai Pottru - Deleted Scene 2 - Maara Rejects Annamayilu | Sudha Kongara|Suriya|2D Entertainment
snippet.description:
Get a glimpse of Surya’s  “Soorarai Pottru” deleted scene. Amazon’s original movie Surya’s “Soorarai Pottru” is about Maara (Surya), a boy from a remote village dreaming of having his airline service.

While Maara is trying to build his career with his dream of having an airline service, his mother is worried about his marriage. Here's a deleted scene of "Soorarai Pottru," where Maara Rejects Annamayilu.

Listen to the mother-son telephonic conversation in this video. What is Maara's reaction to her mother's blackmail?

Find out on 2D Entertainment.

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there’s an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar

snippet.title: IPL 2021 Auction Tamil|Updated Squad List of all teams| CSK MI RCB RR DC KXIP KKR SRH|IPL NEWS TAMIL
snippet.description:
IPL 2021 Auction Tamil|Updated Squad List of all teams| CSK MI RCB RR DC KXIP KKR SRH|IPL NEWS TAMIL
IPL AUCTION 2021 TROLL | CSK TEAM PLAYERS LIST | PUJARA MOEEN ALI
IPL AUCTION 2021: FULL LIST of Players bought by IPL Teams CSK, MI, SRH, RCB, KXIP, KKR, DC & RR

#iplauction, #ipl2021, #iplauction2021

Morris becomes most expensive signing in IPL auction history
Chris Morris became the most expensive signing in IPL history on Thursday (February 18) with Rajasthan Royals forking out INR 16.25 crores for the South African all-rounder at the 2021 auction. The signing amount surpassed the INR 16 crore that Delhi Daredevils paid for Yuvraj Singh in 2015 - the previous record for a player signed at the auction.

The Royals entered the bid battle only at INR 10.25 crore mark after Mumbai Indians appeared to have wrested Morris from his previous employer - Royal Challengers Bangalore. The Jaipur franchise had to contend with another new bidder - the Punjab Kings - who entered at INR 13.50 crore and went all the way until INR 16 crore before pulling out.

The 33-year-old Morris has previously been a part of Rajasthan Royals, in the 2015 season when he scored 311 runs and took 13 wickets from 11 games. In all, he has played 70 IPL games and scored 551 runs at a strike-rate of 157.88 and taken 80 wickets at an economy of 7.81. Morris was an integral member of the RCB side last season even though an abdominal injury curtailed his participation to nine games. He took 11 wickets at an economy of 6.63. He hasn't played competitive cricket since.

snippet.title: 🔴IPL Auction 2021 Full Details: किस Team ने किया Smart Buy और किस Team ने बनाया Balance?
snippet.description:
All-rounders and foreign fast bowlers fetched the big bucks at this year's IPL players' auction where South Africa's Chris Morris clinched a record-breaking Rs 16.25 crore deal with Rajasthan Royals and uncapped Karnataka player Krishnappa Gowtham also invited a bank-breaking bid.

Morris became the most expensive buy in the IPL auction history with Rajasthan Royals shelling out big money for the all-rounder even as uncapped players such as Gowtham also hogged the limelight here on Thursday.

Spin bowling all-rounder Gowtham was bought for a record Rs 9.25 crore by the Chennai Super Kings. The 32-year-old is currently with the Indian team as a net bowler for the ongoing Test series against England.

Tamil Nadu's Shahrukh Khan, named after the Bollywood superstar, expectedly got a handsome Rs 5.25 crore deal from Punjab Kings, more than 51 times his base price of Rs 20 lakh. Shahrukh has been in the limelight with his exploits in the recent Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy.

localized.description:
All-rounders and foreign fast bowlers fetched the big bucks at this year's IPL players' auction where South Africa's Chris Morris clinched a record-breaking Rs 16.25 crore deal with Rajasthan Royals and uncapped Karnataka player Krishnappa Gowtham also invited a bank-breaking bid.

Morris became the most expensive buy in the IPL auction history with Rajasthan Royals shelling out big money for the all-rounder even as uncapped players such as Gowtham also hogged the limelight here on Thursday.

Spin bowling all-rounder Gowtham was bought for a record Rs 9.25 crore by the Chennai Super Kings. The 32-year-old is currently with the Indian team as a net bowler for the ongoing Test series against England.

Tamil Nadu's Shahrukh Khan, named after the Bollywood superstar, expectedly got a handsome Rs 5.25 crore deal from Punjab Kings, more than 51 times his base price of Rs 20 lakh. Shahrukh has been in the limelight with his exploits in the recent Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy.

#IPLAuction #IPLAuction2021 #SoldUnsoldPlayers

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

Episode 3106: Jethalal Apologise To Iyer's Boss
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Iyer takes Jethalal to his office. Jethalal meets Iyer's boss and informs him that he will unable to deliver 100 tabs and also apologize for not fulfilling his promise. Iyer's boss asks him the reason so Jethalal tells him the reason also apologizes to Iyer and asks him to say sorry to Babita on behalf of him. Catch the fun and watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Jilla Latest Telugu Full Movie | Vijay, Mohanlal, Kajal Agarwal, Brahmanandam @SriBalajiMovies
snippet.description:
Watch Jilla Latest Telugu Full Movie, Starring Vijay, Kajal Aggarwal, Mohanlal, Brahmanandam, Soori, Sampath Raj, Surekha Vani, Pradeep Rawat, Meenal, Mahat Raghavendra, LB Sriram and others, Directed by Neason, Music Composed by D Imman, Produced by Kumar Reddy, Prasad Sannidi. #Jilla #Vijay #KajalAggarwal #Mohanlal

Story: Shakti (Vijay), loses his father and is raised by don Shivaiah (Mohan Lal). Shivaiah raises Shakti like his own son and Shakti starts hating police officers from childhood. Once he grows up, he follows the footsteps of Shivaiah, who runs crime syndicate in Vijayawada and indulges in illegal activities.

Shakti falls in love with a girl Shanti (Kajal) for her daring attitude not knowing that she is a cop. One day, Shivaiah is humiliated by Commissioner of Police and he decides to make his son Shakti a police officer. Shakti who has aversion towards police forcefully becomes Khaki officer. Once he becomes police officer, the father and son are fitted against each other.

☛ Subscribe to YouTube: http://goo.gl/tEjah

snippet.title: Playing 90's Games Ft. Kunal Chhabhria | ACV Team | Rohit Sadhwani
snippet.description:
Is video mai humne try kiya hai ki 90's games dikha k Bachman ki yaad dilaye aapko
ummed hai aapko humara ye video pasand aaya hoga
batao hume aap konse games khelte the aur konsa game aapka favourite tha

Cast:- maine sabko phone kiya aur bola shoot hai aajao
@Kunal Chhabhria bhai ko jaise hi bola video k leye bhai ne turant haa kar diya par dates ek mahine baad mile huehueheuhe
@Jashan Sirwani  aur @Tanish Sirwani  ek baar mai khushi khushi aa gaye ache log hai
Aneemesh b anytime aata hai
Akash jagtap ne natak Kiye ki yaar shayad nai aa pau dekhta hu kaam hai woh toh bhala ho jashan ka jo us k Aage ghoda bana tab ja k mana jagtap
@Paras Rupani  ne b bahut natak kiye fir usse 1 hr free mai gym karwari tab jaa k aaya
@Ritesh Sadhwani toh mera chota bhai toh aana hi padega usse kyuki bado ki baat mante hi hai 
Mohit Dodeja ye mera purana school friend hai jab b kdr Jane ka plan bane ye hi banda h jo hamesha natak karta hai aur humare plans nai ban pate
Aur Mai khud kyuki mera khud ka video hai huehuehe
Concept:- maine ek video socha tha, ek mahine se final tha ki woh video banunga par jab experiment kiya toh laga yaar jo dikhana chahta hu video Mai woh toh ho hi nai payega scientifically fir socha thoda change karta hu, thoda change karte karte pure video ka concept hi change ho gaya, aur ye sab hua video shoot k 2 din pehle
Shoot:- hum sab ne mil baat k kiya, kabi @Kunal Chhabhria ne shoot kiya, dusre cam se shoot kiya @Tanish Sirwani  aur @Jashan Sirwani  ne fir kabi mere bhai @Ritesh Sadhwani ne toh kabi Animesh ne shoot kiya
Sound:- Kabi maine handle kiya kabi @Paras Rupani ne aur kabi Akash Jagtap ne
Edit:- Pehle line up mere bhai @Ritesh Sadhwani ne kiya fir maine pura kiya aur @Kunal Chhabhria ne final touch mai help ki mast hai bhai bahut


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Be the Member :- https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCZfR5BkmwGWdCov71DtyWOQ/join

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/mrrohitsadhwani
facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/mrrohitsadhwani

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.description:
Omkar disguises himself as a doctor to unravel the hidden truth of Neil. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more

#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Ep. 1179 | Heer In Serious Trouble!
snippet.description:
In a shocking turn of events, mysterious goons forcefully abduct Heer and take her to a secluded warehouse. However, Heer soon tries to escape from their clutches and desperately makes a run for it. Will Heer succeed in escaping?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26Kt-V0yTlZzY3RFB0Equyf1h

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.title: Rakesh Tikait ने फिर दोहराया, आंदोलन के लिए एक फसल की कुर्बानी को तैयार किसान | Muqabla
snippet.description:
Farmers Protest: किसान आंदोलन के करीब तीन महीने पूरे होने वाले हैं. आंदोलन के प्रमुख चेहरा राकेश टिकैत का कहना है कि सरकार सोचती है कि दो महीने आंदोलन नहीं चलेगा. लेकिन किसान अपनी एक फसल की कुर्बानी दे देगा, लेकिन आंदोलन पीछे नहीं हटेगा. आंदोलन में फसल के हिसाब से आंदोलनकारी आते रहेंगे. टिकैत ने कहा कि एक फसल की कुर्बानी झेलनी पड़े तो हम तैयार हैं. राकेश टिकैत ने कहा कि रेल रोको आंदोलन सरकार को संकेत देने का है.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

चैनल सब्सक्राइब करें : https://www.youtube.com/user/ndtvindia?sub_confirmation=1
हमारे फेसबुक पेज को लाइक करें : https://www.facebook.com/NDTVIndia
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें : https://twitter.com/ndtvindia
NDTV Apps डाउनलोड करें : http://www.ndtv.com/page/apps
अन्य वीडियो देखें : https://khabar.ndtv.com/videos
हमें इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें : https://www.instagram.com/ndtvindia/

फ़ूड वीडियो के लिए NDTV ज़ायका सब्सक्राइब करें :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8affpNLjC7-EhiAeTuGZ6g/?guided_help_flow=5

हेल्थ वीडियो के लिए NDTV सेहत वेहत सब्सक्राइब करें :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBtSjjjxahfjdZTZiLKXkhw?view_as=subscriber

hi.title: Rakesh Tikait ने फिर दोहराया, आंदोलन के लिए एक फसल की कुर्बानी को तैयार किसान | Muqabla
hi.description:
Farmers Protest: किसान आंदोलन के करीब तीन महीने पूरे होने वाले हैं. आंदोलन के प्रमुख चेहरा राकेश टिकैत का कहना है कि सरकार सोचती है कि दो महीने आंदोलन नहीं चलेगा. लेकिन किसान अपनी एक फसल की कुर्बानी दे देगा, लेकिन आंदोलन पीछे नहीं हटेगा. आंदोलन में फसल के हिसाब से आंदोलनकारी आते रहेंगे. टिकैत ने कहा कि एक फसल की कुर्बानी झेलनी पड़े तो हम तैयार हैं. राकेश टिकैत ने कहा कि रेल रोको आंदोलन सरकार को संकेत देने का है.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.

snippet.title: झटपट बनाये आटे से ऐसा पराठा जिसे खाकर सब आपकी तारीफ करे /Chilli Garlic Paratha Recipe No Knead /Roll
snippet.description:
Agar aapko Roti ya Paratha gundhne mein bor hota hai toh aaj main aapko gehun ke aate ka aisa paratha bataungi jise kha kar sab aapki tarif karenge aur iss garlic parathe ko banane ke liye na hume belne ki zaroorat hai na ghundne ki …jhatpat banke ready ho jati hai ….

Doston Agar ap ko meri yeah Recipe Pasand aaye toh…LIKE and SHARE... Karna Nahi Bhule and Latest Recipe Update ke Liye... Subscribe to Karein ..and Bell Icon Press Kare…Free!

Support & Subscribe My Channel: https://goo.gl/QU4TtG
Youtube Channel: http://www.youtube.com/c/RayKitchen
झटपट बनाये आटे से ऐसा पराठा जिसे खाकर सब आपकी तारीफ करे /Chilli Garlic Paratha Recipe No Knead /Roll
Ingredient
1. Wheat flour 1Cup
2. Garlic 7-8 Cloves
3. Chilli 2
4. Corriander 1tbsp
5. Salt as per taste
6. Water 1 &1/4Cup
7. Clarified Butter 1 -1.5tbsp

snippet.title: Why Jakarta is sinking
snippet.description:
The 400-year curse dragging Indonesia's capital into the sea.

Subscribe to our channel! http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

Like many coastal cities around the world, Jakarta is dealing with sea level rise. But Indonesia's biggest city also has a unique problem: Because of restricted water access in the city, the majority of its residents have to extract groundwater to survive. And it's causing the city to sink. Today, Jakarta is the world’s fastest-sinking city.

The problem gets worse every year, but the root of it precedes modern Indonesia by centuries. In the 1600s, when the Dutch landed in Indonesia and built present-day Jakarta, they divided up the city to segregate the population. Eventually, that segregation led to an unequal water piping system that excluded most Indigenous Jakartans, forcing them to find other ways to get water.

To understand how it all ties together, and what’s in store for Jakarta’s future, watch the video above. 

Sources and further reading:

If you want to learn more about the development of Jakarta’s urban water supply going all the way back to colonial times, check out Michelle Kooy’s detailed reports:
https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/j.1468-2427.2008.00791.x
https://www.academia.edu/3682152/Splintered_networks_The_colonial_and_contemporary_waters_of_Jakarta

To understand Jakarta’s colonial history and the segregation that came of it, check out this article from the Journal of Historians of Netherlandish Art: https://jhna.org/articles/dutch-batavia-exposing-hierarchy-dutch-colonial-city/

To read about the evolution of the canals the Dutch built in present-day Jakarta and how their deterioration impacted water access and segregation, here’s a study from Dr. Euis Puspita Dewi, who we feature in the video:
https://scholar.ui.ac.id/en/publications/urban-canals-in-colonial-batavia-rethinking-clean-and-dirt-space

To get a broader look at the many other cities sinking in Indonesia, check out this article by Dr. Estelle Chaussard: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0034425712003975

Thanks for watching and let us know what you think in the comments!

snippet.title: The Legend Of The Ice Hound (Clash Of Clans)
snippet.description:
Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #superwizard #icehound #supertroops

snippet.title: Massive Manhunt Launched To Nab Terrorists Who Opened Fire On Cops In Srinagar | CNN News18
snippet.description:
Two policemen were killed by militants in the Baghat area on high-security airport road here on Friday, police said. The terrorists shot the two policemen from close range, a police official said, adding they were taken to a hospital where both of them succumbed.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 03 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th Feb 2021
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 03 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th Feb 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-struck souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal

#HappilacPaints 
#Colors0fHappiness
#HappilacWipeout
